description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body and a short, conical beak. Its plumage is predominantly dark gray with a white patch on the cheek and lighter markings on the underside and near the tail. The wings are compact and held close to the body, while the tail is short and slightly rounded. The legs and feet are slender and appear to be a muted grayish color. The bird's head is rounded, and the eyes are positioned laterally, giving it a typical passerine profile. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and quick, agile flight, commonly seen in urban parks and gardens.
description: A small, dark gray bird with a white cheek patch, short conical beak, and slightly rounded tail. Its compact body and subtle markings are typical of urban passerines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's dark gray body, white cheek patch, and short beak.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded head, short beak, and narrow body profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same dark gray plumage and white cheek patch, with the tail and feet visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the symmetrical wing and tail arrangement and subtle lighter markings on the head.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark gray with white cheek patch and subtle lighter markings
